description: CLI Tool Registry with Validator Mappings for spectrafit-core

edit.description: Validates edit tool inputs before execution (native Python + Pydantic)
checks: Path traversal detection (no .. or absolute paths)
PyO3 boundary validation for Rust #[pyfunction] returns (String/Result<String> only)
Schema file Pydantic v2 compliance (no Any/Dict/List loose typing)

create.description: Validates create tool inputs before execution (native Python + Pydantic)
checks: Path traversal detection (no .. or absolute paths)
File non-existence (create is for new files only)
Pydantic v2 schema compliance for Python files
create.implementation: Pydantic BaseModel with AST parser integration

bash.description: Validates bash commands before execution (native Python + Pydantic)
warnings: long_running_operation: cargo build/test, npm install, etc.
side_effects_detected: git reset, git clean, kill, truncate
bash.implementation: Pydantic BaseModel with regex-based pattern detection

integration_points.pre_tool_execution: Before any agent tool executes, check tool_registry for applicable validator
integration_points.post_validation: Log decision to audit trail at .claude/audit/validation-decisions.jsonl
integration_points.error_handling: If validator crashes/times out, log to .claude/audit/validation-errors.log and block operation
